dir_convention.roll+: roll the wrist to the left
dir_convention.roll-: roll the wrist to the right

grip_only_rule: grip 이벤트 AND 지배축 |누적| < 경계*0.3 → grip 단독 문장
selection: margin>0 in BOTH clip & siglip2 (min-margin top-3 폴백)

train: push the hand slightly forward
bring the arm a bit forward
shift the gripper a bit ahead
slide the hand a bit forward
take the hand a little to the front
advance the arm a bit to the front
push the hand a little forward
push the end effector a bit ahead
holdout: nudge the hand forward just a touch

train: move the arm far forward
bring the arm a long distance forward
move the arm far ahead
slide the hand way out forward
bring the arm considerably forward
bring the end effector a lot to the front
take the hand far to the front
advance the end effector a lot forward
advance the arm way out to the front
push the end effector way out ahead
holdout: advance the hand a great deal toward the front
drive the gripper firmly ahead

train: move the gripper slightly backward

pull the gripper considerably to the rear
